message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupHeaderFontStyle bold
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor Developer as Dev
participant "Vercel Build Machine" as Build
participant CMS as CMS
participant "Vercel Production Machine" as Prod

Dev -> Build : Git push

Build -> Build : Compile

group Collecting page data
  Build -> CMS : Fetch content data
  CMS --> Build : Return content data
end

Build -> Build : Generate static pages

Build -> Prod : Upload build output

Prod -> Prod : Deploy

@enduml
